lines.text: Fl… No, I'm Cartethyia… Yes, that's right. Cartethyia.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: Farewell, Laureate! I hope that someday, I might stand on stage with your troupe.
lines.quest_name: What Yesterday Wept, Today Doth Sing

lines.text: You've found {PlayerName} and safeguarded Septimont... It's like something out of a knight's tale. Hmm, no, wait... Gladiator's tale?
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: Hmm... I think it's time we compare notes. Let's fill in this <color=RedD>story's</color> blanks, shall we?
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: When Lupa vanished, I destroyed the experimental unit, pursued the Threnodian, and defeated the Lioness of Glory It controlled. Then I came across this place.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: You remember how the Threnodian took on a part of the Sentinel's knowledge and permissions, yes?
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: For the Sentinel, the information stolen was Their very memories.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: For this reason, even the Sentinel forgot that before merging with the Threnodian, They transferred some of their knowledge to the Central Hub in Septimont.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: It was a secret, one the Threnodian should never learn. The Sentinel moved it there for safekeeping.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: Within it, I found a special frequency. A part of it... felt like yours. I believe it's what the Sentinel left for you. So I took it.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: It seems like a clue... the true secret They left for you is not here but in that direction.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: You see, before I came to meet you, I passed by the city of Septimont.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: The arena I destroyed has been restored, but in the people's hearts, it's still {PlayerName} and Lupa who claimed victory.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: The Fractsidus's power to reshape reality is deeper than we realized. I'm afraid this is just the beginning.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: I once believed the Threnodian sought to use the Fractsidus to regain power, but Its true goal is the Central Hub. I believe it's due to this secret the Sentinel has hidden.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: The Dark Tide... connects everything.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: I cannot pinpoint where the Sentinel's message lies. I'm afraid you must go there yourself, {PlayerName}.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: But the worst of the storm has passed. Let's take a moment to rest.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: Lupa, will you be our tour guide? Show us the sights and glories of Septimont?
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: I'd love to hear more about what you mentioned earlier. The wind blowing through golden flags and the sound of wind chimes...
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: Look at you... you can't go on much longer.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: You didn't forget.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: Someone stole your <color=RedD>role</color> in the story. Even your name on the placards in the arena would be unreadable.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: Your existence has been erased. Only by unmaking this story can it be reclaimed.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: When I was a child... long ago, I heard tales of Septimont.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: A city full of passion and life. People there drank deeply, laughed loudly, appreciated sculpture, and lived for the hunt.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: Men and women feared nothing. They burned like fire, giving all their light and heat before fading.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: But when I arrived in Septimont, it had already been undone by dark hands. With the Dark Tide sweeping the streets, the city was nothing but an empty shell.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: The Leviathan... I will not give It the chance to make the people of Rinascita weep and bleed.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: I will drag whoever orchestrated this tragedy out of the shadows.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: No.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: You said it yourself. This is your city. Some things, only you can do.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: The monster leaving its trace in the Dark Tide... I can feel it. Its frequency is similar to my own.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: The Threnodian created me to be a Resonator for Its power. But I wasn't the only one. Many "vessels" before me failed.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: There is still much I don't know. I'll keep searching. But no matter what, you have a certain "specialness."
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: Once... I sought to end it all. Someone stopped me.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: Even a life mocked by fate can break its curse. Whatever you seek to do, whether you're weak or strong, you must strive for it.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: I returned to the world thanks to a certain person's help.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: I believe {Male=he;Female=she} will come here and reshape this twisted story.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: Then you will see for yourself.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: Victory isn't won in an instant. It takes patience and perseverance. What we can't do now, someone will carry forward later.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: If you want to save your city, then hold on. No matter the pain, no matter the doubts, you must keep going.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: Just like how you wandered Septimont before I came, broken yet determined to leave to find help for the city.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: Jump to a new story, and bring my message to that person.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: I'm close to that abnormal frequency...
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: ...You're in the submerged aqueducts.
lines.quest_name: Flames of Heart

lines.text: The traces will guide you here, {PlayerName}.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: And, when the time comes, you'll bring this story to its rightful end.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: The scent of seawater... It's right ahead.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: (Someone's still alive.)
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: Are you okay? You seem like a local… are there any other survivors?
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: (Tidal Blight… could she mean the Dark Tide?)
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: What's your name?
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: That's alright. Memories can be recovered, and so can your name. I've been through something similar myself, and someone helped me find my way back.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: I've only just arrived here. All of Septimont is cloaked in mist. Would you mind sharing with me what you still remember?
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: My name is Cartethyia. I'm Ragunna's…
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: I'm a wandering knight from Ragunna.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: Don't worry, I'll take care of them.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: Come forth, and face my blade.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: You need to rest before continuing this investigation. Your strength is spent.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: We're both from Rinascita. I'm here by the Sentinel's Will. This is simply my duty, for I was once blessed by the Sentinel.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: The blessings and freedoms They grant... I wish to share them with everyone across these islands.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: It's okay. Do not let it break you. One thing is certain. This anomaly stems from a specific power. Some facilities and records have been rewound nearly two decades back.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: We just need to find out why and who's responsible.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: The clock is ticking, but we still have a chance.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: Don't worry. I'll handle it.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: Compared to the darkness that once whispered in my ears, a tangible enemy is easier to face.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: Besides, the Righteous One will notice this anomaly when {Male=he;Female=she} arrives. Our moves so far will guide {Male=him;Female=her} forward.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: Yes, very much. We correct each other's mistakes and walk the path of salvation together.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: Trust in yourself too. One day, you will reclaim your name.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: As for those vile intentions lurking in the Dark Tide, we'll cut them off together.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: Now, shall we continue the investigation? Are you ready?
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: You plotted this tragedy.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: I don't need any grand reason to slay a villain like you. The Threnodian once sought to pull the entire Rinascita into the Dark Tide, but It failed.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: And so will you.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: Alone? {PlayerName} will come here and find a way to finish this.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: And I will make your so-called perfect play spiral out of control.
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: Silent, hollow words...
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: The Dark Tide engulfing the City of Glory...
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: All shall be swept away by the winds at the story's end!
lines.quest_name: Shadow of Glory

lines.text: Ah... it's all gone now. But I'll ask the tavern keeper if he can prepare something for you later.
lines.quest_name: Three Wishes

lines.text: The Laurus Salad was as delightful as ever. Well worth reacquainting myself with so I can make a bowl myself.
lines.quest_name: Three Wishes

lines.text: Fresh, crisp, sweet... Heh.
lines.quest_name: Three Wishes

lines.text: Come, sit with me, {PlayerName}. Let's enjoy a moment of peace.
lines.quest_name: Three Wishes

lines.text: Yes, and so... I've been thinking about what I vowed to you before.
lines.quest_name: Three Wishes

lines.text: To savor the things I desire, visit the places I long for, and meet those I wish to see.
lines.quest_name: Three Wishes

lines.text: To become a roving knight is my true ambition. A wish list is something to be experienced one step at a time.
lines.quest_name: Three Wishes

lines.text: The third, too... though by unexpected means.
lines.quest_name: Three Wishes

lines.text: Those are my adoptive parents... and their child.
lines.quest_name: Three Wishes

lines.text: Perhaps it was fate's cruel jest. I couldn't find any trace of them after they moved from Ragunna, but here in Septimont, I discovered where they had resettled.
lines.quest_name: Three Wishes

lines.text: Only... they no longer recognize me.
lines.quest_name: Three Wishes

lines.text: The truth that I was their daughter was a memory the Threnodian crafted for them, disappearing when It was sealed away in the tower.
lines.quest_name: Three Wishes

lines.text: I don't know what they went through after that fateful day, but at least... they are still alive. They even have their own child.
lines.quest_name: Three Wishes

lines.text: They walk here every day, so I come and sit for a while to watch them from a distance.
lines.quest_name: Three Wishes

lines.text: It's alright, {PlayerName}. In fact, I'm at peace with it now.
lines.quest_name: Three Wishes

lines.text: If they had died because of the Order's heavy hand, I would've felt true pain. But this... this is the best outcome I could hope for.
lines.quest_name: Three Wishes

lines.text: To live twenty years with the weight of a lost child... I don't want to imagine that kind of torment.
lines.quest_name: Three Wishes

lines.text: Besides, through all these twists of fate, all three of my wishes have been fulfilled.
lines.quest_name: Three Wishes

lines.text: Now if I crave a Laurus Salad, I can prepare it myself and savor its taste.
lines.quest_name: Three Wishes

lines.text: And I still have many years ahead to see the world and the places I long to visit.
lines.quest_name: Three Wishes

lines.text: As for the people I hope to meet... this unexpected journey led me to find them in another city.
lines.quest_name: Three Wishes

lines.text: The winds of Rinascita always seem to bring me what I seek. I am content.
lines.quest_name: Three Wishes

lines.text: Laureate?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Our Tacet Marks are glowing again. It appears there is a special connection between them.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: What is the meaning of this?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: How did you first come to notice me?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: You heard the Sentinel's voice? Then tell me, am I Their Resonator?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I... I've actually been searching for the answer to this question, too.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: My memories are fragmented. I remember becoming a Resonator, and the moment I was given the name Fleurdelys.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I also remember fighting... something. But the details and the outcome of that battle are lost to me.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: You seem deeply concerned about the Sentinel. Tell me, why is that?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: This must be the frequency that's entangled within you. Is it some kind of Echo?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Yes... I'm experiencing a similar kind of frequency split. Though there is little that remains of my Resonance powers.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I feel its frequency weakening... I understand why you're eager to find the Sentinel.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: You said you heard the Sentinel's voice. Was there anything else They said?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Ensnared? Does that mean behind the seals there's...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I'm sure you've noticed that "I" was drawn here only as a frequency.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: My true form currently resides inside an inverted Sonoro Sphere suspended high in the sky. At its center stands a tower, its gate locked by three seals.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I've sensed a voice calling out to me from behind them... Could it be the Sentinel?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: The scent of a Threnodian...? You can perceive the Threnodian?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Do you think I'm the Threnodian's Resonator?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Hmm... I take it this theory would benefit you as well?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: After all, that unique Echo of yours needs the Sentinel's powers for treatment, does it not?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Even in adventure tales, it's not always the witch who loses her memory, it could also be a Blessed Maiden trying to regain her powers!
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: In that case, it appears we share the same goal of finding the Sentinel.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Spending so much time alone in the Sonoro Sphere gave me plenty of time to consider countless possibilities.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I've braced myself for whatever may come until I find the answers I'm seeking.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: A part of the Sonoro Sphere is actually on land, though its outer perimeter is surrounded by a barrier.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I cannot leave, and no one can enter.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I'm afraid that won't do...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: That barrier also acts as the power source that maintains the Sonoro Sphere's integrity. If it's destroyed, the entire Sphere will collapse.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: And the ruins along with the Tacet Discords it houses would come crashing down on Ragunna. It would be catastrophic.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Yes, I've occasionally sensed someone wandering outside the barrier as if searching for a way inside.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Perhaps they know something?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Emm... Almost like a deep-sea jellyfish?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I-I wasn't able to get a clear look. I can only describe the feeling I got from her as a Resonator.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: It would seem this Resonance ability can only last for so long.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Something tells me you will keep your promise.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: No matter the outcome, this may be my chance to find the answers I've been looking for.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Laureate. You have come.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Greetings, I am Cartethyia. And you are?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Oh, a Fisalia... It seems your ties with the Order are more complicated than they appear.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I'm also unsure of what's happened to me... I've been searching for answers.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: This must be the Sword of Divinity—Tyrvine, the one with the Sentinel's powers sealed within.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Memories flowed into my mind just as you entered the Sonoro Sphere, granting me information about the sword's origins.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Would you mind if I tried touching it?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: The question of whose Resonator I am... is now perfectly clear.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: If I am not the Sentinel's Resonator. Then that must mean...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Huh?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: This connection formed between the Sentinel and the Threnodian, the second Dark Tide, and the forming of this Sonoro Sphere...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: As you spoke, I remembered a few more things. There are two other swords.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: The Sword of Discord—Hognis, and the Sword of Virtue—Haultir.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Yes, did you see them too?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Placing the three swords on their respective pedestals should break the seal over the main tower...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: But why would this information be revealed to me now...? Is this the Threnodian's doing?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Please. Cartethyia would suffice. I am but a fake after all.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Since you are willing to overlook the possibilities of a trap, then there's no reason for me to worry and turn away.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I underestimated your resolve. I'm sorry.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Simply place Tyrvine on the pedestal behind me and this tower will elevate itself.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I believe it was meant for the "true" Maiden.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Under the right circumstances, the one to wield this sword and enter the Sonoro Sphere would be the Sentinel's Resonator, the Blessed Maiden.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: The Sentinel entrusted Their power to the Resonator so that she could lend assistance when the corruption of the Threnodian altered Them. Quite logical, isn't it?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: But...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I... just remembered the day I was crowned by the Order, and the moment the Dark Tide descended upon us...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Hmm?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: That is all I can remember...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: You witnessed it as well, Cantarella?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: You saw that too?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Gehinnom, the one you mentioned earlier, what happened to him?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I understand...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Thank you...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Anna... Casidomo... Olmnat... everyone...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I am finally... finally able to face all of you...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I am not your enemy, and your sacrifices were not in vain...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Sorry you had to see me lose my composure.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I've found my true self again. It does not matter if I am indeed the Threnodian's Resonator.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Because I know who to stand by and who to cut down.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Some of my memories have returned, thanks to you and Cantarella.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: No, not yet. Not until we free the Sentinel and defeat the Threnodian.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: That is why we need to investigate the frequency you absorbed earlier.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: The Threnodian's energy has also been split... Could it be the work of the Sentinel?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: If the Sentinel splits Their own energy to prepare the "true" Blessed Maiden...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Then why would They split off the Threnodian's energy, and then channel it through Hognis to the person who unsealed the passage?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Possibly, but the Threnodian's energy would damage the body of the Sentinel's Resonator.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: You wouldn't be affected since Abby resides within you.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: But surely a second frequency would interfere with the resonance of the Sentinel's "true" Blessed Maiden.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: But the frequency of the Sentinel's "true" Blessed Maiden is supposed to clash with that of the Threnodian's.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: A fusion of the two would endanger her life.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Huh?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I haven't forgotten how I became a Resonator, and I know I don't have the ability to do that.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Do you think the mixed frequencies Abby felt... came from me?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: But why would I do that?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Of course.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Looks like Abby's settled down. It seems we were both affected.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I'm starting to remember everything, just like you sensed I would.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: The force that modulated the Sentinel and Threnodian's frequencies came from me.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Though it wasn't what I originally intended, I think having you take it from here may be for the best.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: This crown... it turned into what it is after the Dark Tide came.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: This is what the Threnodian uses to control Its Resonator.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: When the Threnodian unleashed the second Dark Tide, "I"—as the Cartethyia you see before you—split the part of myself that wished to live after seeing the corruption that stood before me.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I chose to be broken from the very beginning to escape the Threnodian's inevitable grasp.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: You see, when I destroyed the Threnodian that had taken over the Sentinel's body, It immediately began to assimilate into Fleurdelys, Its Resonator.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: She was the part of "me" that was left after I split myself. She retained the most power, and now hopes to one day destroy everything... even herself.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: The Threnodian's endless whispers and screeches are slowly chipping away at Fleurdelys' resolve.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: That's why she had no choice but to split her power's frequencies, just to buy herself more time.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: But using such Resonance abilities came at a cost. The split frequencies... they needed a vessel.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: We don't have much time left.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: So, you see... I have been instinctively searching for someone to wield that power.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: All that was given, possessed, or taken by the false Divinity, I must pass to the one capable of resisting It.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: This is how I intend to lay the false Divinity to rest.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Not just Its life, but Its very existence for all time.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Fleurdelys, the part of me I left behind. The one that also contains the Threnodian.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Bound by obsession, till relieved of duty.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Today, the part of me that wishes to live on will vanish. Is it because my wish has finally been fulfilled?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Will you accompany me one last time?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Why? Why are you doing this?! Neither Cartethyia nor Fleurdelys should continue to exist!
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Don't go...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Good morning...um...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: It's time to go. Today is the day we settle this.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Are you all right? The gravity that occupies this space is the opposite of what you're used to. It took me some time to get used to it too.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I believe it's to prevent them from falling to the ground.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Tacet Discords. The Dark Tide. And these ruins themselves.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Until you get used to the gravity here, I suggest we travel via "Phaom."
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: It's the name I gave to a Gondola.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: You are...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: ...Such memories do bring me pain, but... that is evidence of their truth.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Without the truth, I would not have had to strength to carry on.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: The truth is a beacon in the maelstrom of my life.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: And I would rather suffer for it and rejoice in it than abandon it to blissful ignorance.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I am true to myself. Please don't make me forget who I am.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: No... if you do that, "I" wouldn't be "me."
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: To deny my own self and my experiences means any perfection I reach will be hollow.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I would be "heartless."
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: {PlayerName}...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I have never seen you look as gentle as you did during our fight.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I want to say that it doesn't matter...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: But... since you first met me as Cartethyia, that is who I shall be.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I thought I saw the Sentinel just now...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: So where are They...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: What do we do now?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I can't return to Ragunna as Fleurdelys, and I need not serve Divinity anymore.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Who I was, and my past aspirations, are all gone. I feel... empty.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Not a bad idea.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: But right now... I don't want to think about anything...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Not a bad idea.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: But right now... I don't want to think about anything...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Not a bad idea.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: But right now... I don't want to think about anything...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Mmm... you're right.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I'll stay here for a while longer, is that alright?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: This was where everything started, the origin of the second Dark Tide.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I have one final request. Now that you have the power to split and merge energy, there is something only you can do.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Please... use the connection I still share with Fleurdelys to bring the last fragments of her tortured consciousness here.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Then, with your power, remake us as one... and finally release us from this world.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: That way... the Threnodian will remain trapped forever in a lifeless shell, unable to return to this world.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I have lived my life to the fullest. I would like the ones who are left to do so as well.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Cartethyia has had her wish fulfilled. Now it's Fleurdelys' turn.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: She seeks self-destruction, to end the Divinity, and with it, her torment.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: She has lost all hope and believes that no rescue is possible.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Remaking us as one is the only way I can think of to fulfill her wish... or rather, grant her what "we" wish.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I was born to this world cursed. The Threnodian intended for me to live as a threat to others.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: But the puppet born of Its wickedness will become the prison that seals Its fate.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: "I" shall be whole again, true to myself at last.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: A fitting end, don't you think?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I have reached my final destination. One last swan song, and then the lights go out!
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Thank you...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: And... forgive me.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Cantarella...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Tyrvine...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: What's inside?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Does it also hold the sacrifice you made?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Was it...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Thank you... in spite of my curse, my life of hardship, I must still save what is true.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Oh, dear... I completely forgot about this...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Isn't Abby... living inside your Tacet Mark?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I'm afraid Phaom would refuse that suggestion...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Sorry I woke you.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Yes, a farewell song from the people of Rinascita. We usually sing it when a friend is about to leave.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: During that battle, I never got to say goodbye or mourn their passing.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: And before my memories came back, I wasn't sure if I was worthy of paying them my respects.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: So now, even though I know these are just lingering frequencies, and they might not understand me...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I just... I want to say goodbye properly, and thank them.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Do you think I'm... fooling myself?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Meaning...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Really?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I'm glad...
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: No. If they can still hear and feel, then the time for goodbyes hasn't come.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I need to give them a real victory.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Bound by obsession... till relieved of duty.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Nothing, just a stray thought.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Cartethyia... Yes, Cartethyia will do.
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: I want to stay here for a moment. Will you keep me company?
lines.quest_name: The Maiden, The Defier, The Death Crier

lines.text: Imperator once said: "Let the winds of the past depart. The ships of this new era no longer need their guidance. No longer shall scroll and prophecy bind, but by humanity's will shall a new era be forged."
lines.quest_name: Dawn Breaks on Dark Tides

lines.text: I've now truly returned from the "dead."
lines.quest_name: Dawn Breaks on Dark Tides

lines.text: Please, just call me Cartethyia. Rinascita's Divinity is no more, and with it, the "Blessed Maiden chosen by the Divine."
lines.quest_name: Dawn Breaks on Dark Tides

lines.text: Phoebe, your faith in the Sentinel has never wavered, nor has it been blind. It stems not from obedience, but from a deep belief in Their deeds and ideals.
lines.quest_name: Dawn Breaks on Dark Tides

lines.text: Imperator once led the displaced to these isles, yet what allowed the Ragunnesi to stand firm upon the sea was not Divine favor, but their own efforts.
lines.quest_name: Dawn Breaks on Dark Tides

lines.text: The statue in the city was built in Their likeness, but it was the people who gave shape to the faith it stands for.
lines.quest_name: Dawn Breaks on Dark Tides

lines.text: Faith once united us. It was also what drove us to seek liberation… The path of civilization is never fixed. It shifts with what's being demanded at present.
lines.quest_name: Dawn Breaks on Dark Tides

lines.text: From now on, perhaps I no longer need to hide who I really am.
lines.quest_name: Dawn Breaks on Dark Tides

lines.text: So... I'll join in rebuilding Ragunna too!
lines.quest_name: Dawn Breaks on Dark Tides

lines.text: If it weren't for the Black Shores, we'd have been completely ensnared by Leviathan's schemes. On behalf of the people of Rinascita, please accept our deepest gratitude.
lines.quest_name: Dawn Breaks on Dark Tides

lines.text: This might be the first real conversation we've had since everything ended. Thank you very much, Galbrena.
lines.quest_name: Dawn Breaks on Dark Tides

lines.text: It's a shame I'm not able to absorb the Threnodian's Gem, not in my current state.
lines.quest_name: Dawn Breaks on Dark Tides

lines.text: Still, if you hadn't come to "kill" me, we never could've pulled it off.
lines.quest_name: Dawn Breaks on Dark Tides

lines.text: What? No praise for my performance? I was planning to use this whole affair as a play for next year's Carnevale...
lines.quest_name: Dawn Breaks on Dark Tides

lines.text: Well, we had to make it convincing, didn't we? Looks like I've still got it. Hmm… perhaps it could be a play in the next Carnevale...
lines.quest_name: Dawn Breaks on Dark Tides

lines.text: Would you like to join us, Galbrena?
lines.quest_name: Dawn Breaks on Dark Tides

lines.text: The Sentinel once said They didn't want the people to mourn Their passing with sorrow. What They truly wished to hear were songs and laughter.
lines.quest_name: Dawn Breaks on Dark Tides

lines.text: We'll be inviting our friends from Septimont, too. I do hope you'll all come, including you, {PlayerName}.
lines.quest_name: Dawn Breaks on Dark Tides

lines.text: Then it's settled! If you dare skip it, I'll drag you there myself!
lines.quest_name: Dawn Breaks on Dark Tides

lines.text: Maybe it's more than just a farewell. I think the Tidebreaker wants to escort you on your journey.
lines.quest_name: Dawn Breaks on Dark Tides

lines.text: I'm alright. Please don't worry about me.
lines.quest_name: Dreamcatchers in the Secret Gardens

lines.text: No challenge is too great when your will is strong!
lines.quest_name: Dreamcatchers in the Secret Gardens

lines.text: Yes. It felt the same as the power I sensed when fighting Mya.
lines.quest_name: Dreamcatchers in the Secret Gardens

lines.text: I couldn't pinpoint the source, but it seemed to come from somewhere south of the Black Shores, deep underwater.
lines.quest_name: Dreamcatchers in the Secret Gardens

lines.text: Are you alright?!
lines.quest_name: The Present and the Future

lines.text: That's strange. The Dark Tide at the seabed... It's different from what I've seen before. In Ragunna, it always came from the sky.
lines.quest_name: The Present and the Future

lines.text: Hmm… could you describe the Dark Tide you encountered in more detail?
lines.quest_name: The Present and the Future

lines.text: I see... I'll need some time to think it through.
lines.quest_name: The Present and the Future
